content: Standard scientific image pipeline folder conventions (MCMICRO, Cell Painting Gallery, AFNI QC, DTI pipelines) separate: raw/ (untouched source images), intermediate per-stage outputs (e.g. probability-maps/, segmentation/masks/, illumination/), quantification/ (tabular measurement outputs), and qc/ (per-image overlay PNGs + aggregated HTML/CSV summary report). Raw data is never modified in place; every derived artifact lives in its own stage-named folder mirroring the pipeline steps, enabling safe re-runs and clear provenance.
